name: adr
description: Architecture Decision Records - consult and manage ADRs for project design decisions

interface.shortDescription: Consult and manage architecture decision records.
interface.longDescription: Helps agents review existing ADRs before planning work and create new ADRs for significant architectural decisions.
defaultPrompt: Check existing ADRs before planning this change.
Explain why this architecture was chosen from the ADRs.
Help me write a new ADR for this design decision.
